headline: Capital One Lawsuit Ruling Keeps Legal And Valuation Questions In Focus
summary: Federal judge partially dismisses Trump Organization lawsuit against Capital One Financial (NYSE:COF) over alleged politically motivated account closures. The ruling leaves room for the plaintiffs to refile banking-related claims after a discovery period. The case highlights legal and reputational risks tied to how banks handle account closures for high-profile customers. Capital One Financial (NYSE:COF) is a major U.S. bank focused on credit cards, consumer lending, and commercial banking...

headline: Capital One Software Expands Databolt Capabilities to Address Growing Complexity of Enterprise Data Security
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 23, 2026--RSAC™ 2026 Conference--Capital One Software, the enterprise B2B software business of Capital One, today announced new innovations for Capital One Databolt designed to bridge the gap between sensitive data and secure AI adoption. Unveiled at RSAC™ 2026 Conference, these capabilities will transform how enterprises can protect and leverage underutilized data across their environments.

headline: Ford and Major League Baseball Unite to Celebrate America’s Pastime and the People Who Power It
summary: DETROIT & NEW YORK, March 23, 2026--Ford Motor Company and Major League Baseball today announced a multiyear exclusive partnership that brings together two American icons. As MLB’s Official Automotive Partner, Ford will show up for baseball at every level—from neighborhood Little League fields to the World Series—honoring tradition, celebrating human capability, and powering the moments that matter most.
